overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a vibrant futuristic city district with neon signs, skyscrapers, and palm-lined streets. The camera follows pedestrians through intersections and up stairs in a sunlit cyberpunk urban environment with heavy Japanese-inspired architectural elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city plaza with neon billboards

events.description: crossing a marked pedestrian crosswalk with red traffic lights
passes by a pedestrian with pink hair who turns to face the camera

agents.ego_description: walking forward through a futuristic plaza and crossing a street intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink hair and red glasses walking ahead, then turning to face camera as the player passes

entered.detail: large pink neon sign for BD SHACK on distant building
futuristic pedestrian bridge with teal lighting
tall red traffic light pole with digital displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide futuristic city plaza with the BD SHACK sign visible in the distance. The camera walks forward across a marked crosswalk, passing traffic lights and various pedestrians. A notable character with pink hair and red glasses walks ahead before turning to face the camera as the player passes by.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the top of the towering central skyscraper
camera tilts back down to street level

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk while looking up at the architecture and surrounding buildings

entered.detail: blue neon sign with Japanese text HOテル
wooden stairs with red railings leading up the BD SHACK building

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial street lined with neon storefronts, the BD SHACK sign now dominates the left side while a hotel sign appears on the right. The camera tilts up to admire the towering central skyscraper before returning to street level, passing exterior stairs and various architectural details.

events.description: walking directly toward bright sun causing lens flare and backlit conditions
crossing a wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking through a sunlit intersection toward the bright sun with long shadows

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead into the sun glare

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street
cluster of futuristic towers silhouetted against the bright sun

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide sunlit intersection with palm trees lining the streets. Walking toward the bright sun creates strong backlit conditions and lens flare. The camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk while the BD SHACK building recedes into the left background and the exterior stairs become visible on the left approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level commercial walkway with exterior stairs

events.description: begins ascending the exterior wooden stairs of the BD SHACK building
reaches top of stairs and transitions to upper pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking up exterior stairs and continuing along an elevated walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian path with building entrances and teal lighting

segments.scene_description: Approaching the BD SHACK building from the side, the camera ascends the exterior wooden stairs with red railings, passing pedestrians coming down. Upon reaching the top, the scene transitions to an elevated walkway with the BD SHACK sign now prominent on the left and the upper level of the city stretching ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant futuristic city plaza that gradually ascends into an elevated urban walkway. It begins by crossing a wide plaza toward a distant BD SHACK sign, passing through a crowd of pedestrians including a character with pink hair and red glasses. As the camera moves along a commercial street lined with neon storefronts, it tilts upward to capture a towering central skyscraper before returning to street level. The scene then opens into a sunlit intersection where palm trees line the road and strong lens flare emerges as the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk. Finally, the camera approaches the BD SHACK building from the side and climbs a set of wooden stairs with red railings, emerging onto a high walkway overlooking the sprawling upper level of the city.
